description_long: This object is a pair of small, metallic scissors with a sleek, polished finish, commonly used for precision cutting tasks. The handles are circular and symmetrical, designed for comfortable finger placement, and the blades are short, straight, and finely pointed for detailed work. The entire tool appears to be made from a single piece of metal, giving it a uniform, shiny appearance. The pivot joint is a simple fixed mechanism, allowing the two blades to open and close smoothly. There are no visible grip patterns or rubberized coatings on the handles, indicating a classic, minimalist design. No brand name or logo is visible on the surface.
description: A small, shiny pair of metal scissors with circular handles and short, pointed blades, designed for precision cutting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the scissors, highlighting the slim, straight blades and circular handles.
description_view_1: Angled view from the handle side, emphasizing the thickness of the metal and the alignment of the handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the symmetry of the handles and the straight, pointed blades.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the tips of the blades and the circular openings of the handles.
attribute_handle_type: Circular, straight metal handles with a smooth finish and no ergonomic or insulated features.
attribute_jaw_design: Short, straight, pointed blades with a fine tip, suitable for precision cutting; no serrations or wire-cutting features.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Simple fixed pivot joint allowing smooth opening and closing; no adjustable jaw width.
attribute_grip_pattern: Smooth metal surface with no visible grip pattern or texturing.
